betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Steam Engine§f

§aConvert high-pressure steam into electrical power.§f

The §bSteam Engine§f is a power generation machine that converts steam into usable electricity (HE). When supplied with steam from a boiler and fresh water for coolant, it produces substantial power output.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at the Assembly Machine using welded plates and advanced components.

§6Operation§f:
§b• Steam input§f: Connect a steam pipe from a boiler
§b• Water coolant§f: Provide fresh water via fluid pipe
§b• Power output§f: Connect cables to extract HE
§b• Waste steam§f: The engine outputs exhaust steam

§6Specifications§f:
§b• Input§f: High-pressure steam
§b• Coolant§f: Fresh water
§b• Output§f: Electrical power (HE)
§b• Byproduct§f: Exhaust steam (can be condensed)

§eTip§f: Use a §bCondenser§f to recycle exhaust steam back into water. This creates a closed-loop system that is much more efficient.
